description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a light-colored body and several black attachments. It has a collapsible stock at the rear, a detachable box magazine, and a prominent suppressor mounted on the barrel. The rifle is equipped with a red dot sight on the top rail for quick target acquisition, and a vertical foregrip is attached beneath the handguard for improved handling. The overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and polymer, typical for contemporary urban rifles. The color scheme and accessories suggest it is intended for use in urban environments where versatility and maneuverability are important.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, suppressor, red dot sight, and vertical foregrip, finished in a light color with black attachments.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the rifle's slim profile, red dot sight, and the alignment of the suppressor and foregrip.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the collapsible stock, detachable magazine, suppressor, red dot sight, and vertical foregrip.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view emphasizing the magazine, trigger area, and the underside of the foregrip and suppressor.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the same key features as view 1, with clear visibility of the stock, magazine, and attachments.
